name: Alternative Investment Corporation
summary: Alternative Investment Corporation does not have significant operations. It focuses on the investment opportunities in the real estate sector with primary focus on distressed real estate assets and/or alternative real estate developments, as well as other technologies in the biotech sector. The company was formerly known as Paradigm Resource Management Corporation and changed its name to Alternative Investment Corporation in September 2015. Alternative Investment Corporation was founded in 2007 and is based in New York, New York.
